title: Vexbound
description:
Match. Chain. ConquerVexbound is a free tactical puzzle-battler RPG where a single slide can turn into a cascade of formations, walls, spells, and champion strikes.

Slide troops to line up matching units. Vertical formations charge attacks. Horizontal rows raise defensive walls. Trigger multiple formations at once, chain combos to refund actions, evolve your charges into bigger hits, and break the enemy hero before they break you.

A Puzzle Board With Real TacticsBehind the simple rules is a deep tactics game about timing, pressure, defense, and explosive turns.

• Line up troops to charge attacks and build walls.

• Chain combos to turn one move into a cascade.

• Summon elites and champions with unique abilities.

• Cast hero spells to reshape the board and swing the duel.

• Evolve formations to multiply damage and set up devastating strikes.

• Read your rival, block their charges, and counter at the perfect moment.

Three Ways To Play• Campaign — Battle through a story-driven journey across the five Seals.

• Quick Battle — Jump into a fast duel against the AI with your own army loadout.

• Ranked Online — Challenge friends by room code or climb the global ELO leaderboard against players around the world.

Five Seals. Five Ways To Win.Each faction is bound to an ancient Seal, with its own hero, troops, champions, spells, and battle plan.

• The Crown — Radiant zealots with blazing attacks and holy walls.

• The Veil — Mirror-born tricksters using curses, glass, and reflection.

• The Gild — Gilded war-engines built around armor, siege, and relentless value.

• The Hush — Drowsing wardens with slow, crushing, unstoppable weight.

• The Maw — A bloodthirsty horde built for speed, fury, and all-out pressure.

Fair From The First MatchEvery faction, hero, champion, spell, and relic is unlocked from the start. No pay-to-win shortcuts. No locked competitive toolkit. The same pieces are available to everyone — victory comes from strategy.

Built For Fans Of Tactical Puzzle BattlesIf you love lining up units, setting traps, building defenses, and watching one clever move explode into a board-wide combo, Vexbound is made for you.
description_short: Vexbound is a free tactical puzzle-battler RPG where one slide can chain into a storm. Line up troops, raise walls, summon elites and champions, and break the enemy hero across a story campaign, AI duels, private rooms, and ranked online PvP.
